text.title: BA Trends Routing Index Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes the BA from artefact-state signal to the active rule.

decision-tree.root-question: trends.length within [1, 8] AND each has evidence_urls?

conclusion.verdict: trim list to ≤8; add evidence URLs
verify each trend has internal_mapping or gap marker

text.example: Required fields populated → named owner ≥2 tokens → version_tag semver → published.
